description: SOTAOptimizer: vereint alle 5 Kostenspar-Strategien in einer Pipeline

tools.name: sota-optimize
tools.description: Führt Prompt durch alle 5 Strategien: Cache→Compress→Route→Limit→API.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; import json; o=get_optimizer(); stats=o.stats(); print(json.dumps(stats, indent=2))

tools.name: sota-complexity
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; o=get_optimizer(); print(o.estimate_complexity(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else '', sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else ''))

tools.name: sota-stats
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; import json; print(json.dumps(get_optimizer().stats(), indent=2))

tools.name: sota-best-model
tools.description: Gibt bestes Modell für Komplexitäts-Level zurück.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; o=get_optimizer(); print(o.best_model_for_complexity(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else 'mid'))
